title: (Bullish Signal) BPMC, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling BPMC's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 54 similar cases where BPMC's MACD histogram became positive, and 47 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $105.32 is above $102.95 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 10/26/20 - 11/25/20, the price experienced a +2% Uptrend. During the week of 11/18/20 - 11/25/20, the stock enjoyed a +10% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/9n5kova2dm161.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=f4572fd388d5be86a2c03aa16e4b84e0b0512303

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 24, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on BPMC as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 60 of 79 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for BPMC just turned positive on November 25, 2020. Looking at past instances where BPMC's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 47 of 54 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 87%.

The 10-day Moving Average for BPMC crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on September 23, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 11 of 14 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

Following a +6.64% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where BPMC advanced for three days, in 283 of 334 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 229 of 276 cases where BPMC Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 83%.
